# ARC-QUIC-RFC9002-0003 - QUIC RFC 9002 Retry Recovery Reset Architecture

## Purpose

Describe how the Retry-recovery reset slice satisfies the remaining RFC 9002 Section 6.3 requirements by clearing client congestion and loss-recovery state while preserving the handshake transcript for the replay path.

## Scope

This design covers the RFC 9002 Section 6.3 Retry slice: the client treats Retry as a connection-establishment reroute, resets congestion and loss-recovery state, and preserves the TLS handshake transcript needed to replay the bootstrap ClientHello.
It does not claim RTT-estimation policy beyond Retry receipt or broader Retry handling outside the three Section 6.3 requirements.

## Requirements Satisfied

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P3-0001
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P3-0002
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P3-0003
